title: Japanese Som Tam Papaya Salad
description: A refreshing twist on the traditional Thai salad, featuring the sweetness of papaya and the tanginess of tam sauce, all infused with the essence of Japanese cuisine.

ingredients.name: Papaya
ingredients.notes: Green papaya works best for this recipe

instructions: 1. Peel and shred the papaya into thin strips.
2. In a blender or food processor, combine the tam sauce, chili peppers, garlic, green onions, peanuts, soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, and green curry paste. Blend until smooth.
3. Heat the coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
4. Fry the peanuts until crispy and golden brown.
5. Add the blended sauce to the pan and stir to combine.
6. Add the shredded papaya to the pan and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
8. Garnish with additional peanuts and green onions if desired.
10. Refrigerate leftovers for up to 24 hours.
